mentions.note: Hard company to fix; falling price-to-earnings multiples despite Enrique Lores (ex-HP CEO, ex-PayPal chair) becoming CEO; fundamental challenges remain unresolved.
Long knives out but Cramer sees value; 4.5% yield attractive at $17; company shouldn't be this depressed.

Payment processor down 31% (fifth-worst NASDAQ 100); classic offerings commoditized, late on BNPL/stablecoins; only 10x earnings cheap but stock poorly managed under two CEOs; may become too cheap to ignore in 2026.
